title: Debt Consolidation Services - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search 4 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF APPRISEN FINANCIAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers comprehensive financial counseling services including: -Budget and debt management -Debt repayment strategies -HUD-approved mortgage, delinquency, and default resolution consolidation -Home purchase guidance -Bankruptcy counseling and post-bankruptcy counseling -Student loan counseling 700 Taylor Road Suite 150 Gahanna, OH 43230 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 5am-4pm, Friday 5am-3pm Email (888) 461-2927 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CARECONNECT USA HELPLINES FOR FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides multiple helplines where people can speak with experts and get connected to resources for financial issues, including bankruptcy, credit score improvement, foreclosure, mortgage default and delinquency, and debt management for student loans, credit cards, medical bills, and tax-related debt. 2019 Sandy Pond Lane Waxhaw, NC 28173 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (888) 734-2585 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MONEY MANAGEMENT INTERNATIONAL DEBT AND CREDIT COUNSELING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers credit counseling and debt repayment counseling. -Credit Counseling: A certified credit counselor meets with the client to review and evaluate the client's current financial situation; develop strategies to manage creditor payments as part of a balanced budget; evaluate personal financial goals; and create an action plan. -Debt Management Program: Offers the implementation of a structured debt management plan (DMP) to pay off debt. Negotiates with the client's creditors for reduced fees and interest for the term of the program. The client makes one monthly payment to the program administrator, which electronically disburses the funds to each creditor. The program continues until the debt is completely paid off. Includes follow-up visits. 12603 SW Freeway Suite 450 Stafford, TX 77477 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (866) 889-9347 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NATIONAL FOUNDATION FOR CREDIT COUNSELING CREDIT COUNSELING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers financial reviews and education in person, over the phone, or online. Services include: -Credit and debt counseling -Bankruptcy counseling -Housing counseling (pre-purchase, foreclosure prevention, and reverse mortgage) -Student loan debt counseling -Debt management plans -Credit report reviews -Foreclosure information -Tips for first-time veteran and military homebuyers 2033 K Street NW Suite 425 Washington, DC 20006 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 7 days per week 5am-2pm Email (800) 388-2227 Get Directions Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
